name: Group Auto-Translation
description: Auto-translates group messages between participants' languages via a LibreTranslate backend. Configure in-chat with /tr commands. Admin-gated; disabled until enabled.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

libretranslateUrl.title: LibreTranslate URL
libretranslateUrl.description: Base URL of your LibreTranslate instance. Its host:port MUST also appear in this plugin's manifest `net.allow` (the host denies outbound calls to anything not allow-listed).

libretranslateApiKey.title: LibreTranslate API key
libretranslateApiKey.description: Optional, if your instance requires one.

timeoutMs.title: Translate timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.description: Per-call timeout. Keep at or below the host hook budget (5000ms) so a slow backend doesn't make the host proceed un-translated.

denyReply.title: Reply on denied commands
denyReply.description: If true, reply 'admins only' when a non-admin runs a restricted command.

es.name: Traducción Automática de Grupos
es.description: Traduce automáticamente los mensajes del grupo entre los idiomas de los participantes mediante un backend LibreTranslate. Configúralo en el chat con comandos /tr. Gestionado por administradores; desactivado hasta que se habilite.

minLength.title: Longitud mínima de mensaje a traducir

maxLength.title: Longitud máxima de mensaje a traducir

fr.name: Traduction Automatique de Groupe
fr.description: Traduit automatiquement les messages du groupe entre les langues des participants via un backend LibreTranslate. Configurez dans le chat avec des commandes /tr. Réservé aux administrateurs ; désactivé jusqu'à activation.

minLength.title: Longueur minimale du message à traduire

maxLength.title: Longueur maximale du message à traduire

it.name: Traduzione Automatica di Gruppo
it.description: Traduce automaticamente i messaggi di gruppo tra le lingue dei partecipanti tramite un backend LibreTranslate. Configura in chat con i comandi /tr. Gestito dagli amministratori; disabilitato fino all'attivazione.

ar.name: الترجمة التلقائية للمجموعات
ar.description: يترجم رسائل المجموعة تلقائيًا بين لغات المشاركين عبر خلفية LibreTranslate. اضبطه داخل المحادثة بأوامر /tr. مقيّد للمشرفين؛ معطّل حتى يُفعَّل.

he.name: תרגום אוטומטי לקבוצות
he.description: מתרגם אוטומטית הודעות קבוצה בין שפות המשתתפים דרך backend של LibreTranslate. הגדר בצ'אט עם פקודות /tr. מוגן בניהול; מושבת עד להפעלה.

te.name: గ్రూప్ ఆటో-అనువాదం
te.description: LibreTranslate బ్యాకెండ్ ద్వారా గ్రూప్ సందేశాలను పాల్గొనేవారి భాషల మధ్య స్వయంచాలకంగా అనువదిస్తుంది. /tr కమాండ్‌లతో చాట్‌లో కాన్ఫిగర్ చేయండి. అడ్మిన్-గేటెడ్; ప్రారంభించే వరకు నిష్క్రియం.

zh-CN.name: 群组自动翻译
zh-CN.description: 通过 LibreTranslate 后端自动翻译群组成员之间的消息。使用 /tr 命令在聊天中配置。仅管理员可操作；启用前处于禁用状态。

zh-HK.name: 群組自動翻譯
zh-HK.description: 透過 LibreTranslate 後端自動翻譯群組成員之間的訊息。使用 /tr 指令在聊天中設定。僅管理員可操作；啟用前處於停用狀態。
